_metadata.description: Monthly military basic pay by grade and years of service, 2016-2026. Used for High-3 average calculation.
_metadata.update_frequency: annual (January, after NDAA pay raise enacted)
sources: https://www.navycs.com/charts/ (2026 rates verified against published tables)
notes: All values are monthly basic pay in USD (whole dollars).
Years of service column '0' means under 2 years.
O-1E through O-3E are commissioned officers with 4+ years of prior enlisted service.
Pay grades with null for a YOS column means that combination is not authorized.
Drill pay (reserve/guard) = basic_pay / 30 per drill period.
2026 table verified directly against navycs.com (sourced from DFAS). Historical tables (2016-2025) derived by reverse-applying known NDAA raise percentages.
Values within rounding tolerance (±$1) of DFAS published figures due to DoD whole-dollar rounding methodology.
2025 enlisted E-5 and below reflect the April 1 rates (FY2025 NDAA §601 junior enlisted raise).

pay_raise_history.notes: Additional ~10% for E-5 and below effective April 1, 2025

special_pay_notes.basic_pay_cap: No member may receive basic pay in excess of Level II of the Executive Schedule (10 U.S.C. § 203(a)(2)). Capped rates apply to O-7 through O-10 at high YOS.
special_pay_notes.drill_pay: Reserve/Guard drill pay = monthly_basic_pay / 30 per drill period. Typically 4 drill periods per weekend = 4/30 of monthly pay.
special_pay_notes.combat_zone_tax_exclusion: Basic pay earned in a combat zone is tax-free for enlisted. Officers excluded up to the highest enlisted pay rate.
